excerpt: The Tehran casualty study says that during the 52-day missile wave, 118 missiles were fired at Tehran, 86 landed in populated areas, and 422 civilians were killed.

transform_note: Kept as the direct civilian fatality count for the bounded Tehran episode.
confidence_note: High confidence because the study is dedicated to Tehran and based on Army Staff Headquarters daily reports.

excerpt: The same Tehran casualty study reports 1,579 injured during the 52-day missile wave.

excerpt: The search snippet tied to the Tehran casualty article gives the exact 52-day window as 29 February to 20 April 1988.
